prompt:
Create a production-ready icon atlas for a dark Japanese ninja-fantasy RPG.
The canvas is a strict 5 by 5 grid in exact row-major order.
Every cell is an equal square dark obsidian rounded tile separated by thin black gutters.
Each populated tile contains one centered emblem with a strong silhouette, refined cel-painted detail, subtle gold rim, restrained elemental glow, and consistent three-quarter relief.
Keep every emblem fully inside its own cell with generous padding; nothing may cross a cell boundary.
Cell assignments:
row 1 column 1: 百炼苦无组 (tempered_kunai) — three mirror-polished forged kunai bound in dark red cord
row 1 column 2: 查克拉锁甲 (chakra_mail) — interlocking dark steel chainmail rings threaded with cyan chakra
row 1 column 3: 医疗御守 (medic_charm) — a white ceramic healing charm with a mint pulse crystal
row 1 column 4: 火之意志护符 (will_of_fire_charm) — a bronze leaf-shaped charm surrounding a warm amber flame
row 1 column 5: 砂之守护甲 (suna_guard_mail) — layered sand-gold armor plates flowing around a guarded heart
row 2 column 1: 联军查克拉刃 (alliance_chakra_blade) — a balanced silver combat blade edged in five interwoven chakra colors
row 2 column 2: 爆裂苦无组 (explosive_kunai) — two black kunai wrapped with compact orange explosive tags without writing
row 2 column 3: 医毒千本匣 (poison_senbon) — an open lacquered case of silver senbon with violet medicinal droplets
row 2 column 4: 傀儡机关刃 (puppet_blade) — a segmented red-bronze mechanical blade with visible chakra joints
row 2 column 5: 妙木仙杖 (sage_staff) — a knotted ancient wooden staff capped by a jade natural-energy ring
row 3 column 1: 式纸战扇 (paper_fan) — a white folded-paper war fan with blue chakra-edged feathers
row 3 column 2: 森行斗篷 (forest_cloak) — a moss-green travel cloak clasped with a small wooden leaf
row 3 column 3: 砂织护甲 (sandweave_armor) — tan woven armor reinforced by floating iron-sand scales
row 3 column 4: 仙术修行衣 (sage_robe) — an ochre and deep-red training robe with a natural-energy spiral clasp
row 3 column 5: 纸翼披风 (paper_mantle) — a mantle of overlapping white paper feathers with pale blue edges
row 4 column 1: 联军复合甲 (war_plate) — heavy dark allied battle armor joined by five colored fastening cords
row 4 column 2: 感知目镜 (tracking_lens) — a compact brass monocular lens glowing with concentric sensory rings
row 4 column 3: 百毒御守 (toxin_charm) — a sealed violet antidote gourd protected by green medicinal leaves
row 4 column 4: 妙木蛙御守 (frog_charm) — a carved jade frog charm holding a tiny natural-energy pearl
row 4 column 5: 雨隐纸花坠 (rain_amulet) — a blue paper-flower pendant with one suspended rain droplet
row 5 column 1: 命运罗盘 (fate_compass) — a gold-and-obsidian compass woven from nine luminous life threads
row 5 column 2: 解毒丸 (antidote_pill) — two pale green antidote pills beside a tiny sealed medicine pouch
row 5 column 3: 复苏秘药 (revival_elixir) — a crimson-gold restorative elixir glowing inside a small crystal vial
row 5 column 4: 强效军粮丸 (strong_ration) — three dense black-red enhanced ration pills in reinforced paper wrapping
row 5 column 5: 凝神丸 (focus_pill) — a translucent indigo pill surrounded by a calm circular chakra ripple
No text, letters, numbers, kanji, labels, logos, UI captions, signatures, or watermarks anywhere.
Do not merge cells. Do not change the order. Keep the visual system consistent across the complete atlas.
Internal production filename reference only: sheet-economy-1.png.
style: cohesive premium 2D anime RPG interface art, crisp iconography
composition: strict equal-cell icon atlas with exact row-major ordering
constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no cross-cell elements

prompt:
Create a production-ready icon atlas for a dark Japanese ninja-fantasy RPG.
The canvas is a strict 5 by 5 grid in exact row-major order.
Every cell is an equal square dark obsidian rounded tile separated by thin black gutters.
Each populated tile contains one centered emblem with a strong silhouette, refined cel-painted detail, subtle gold rim, restrained elemental glow, and consistent three-quarter relief.
Keep every emblem fully inside its own cell with generous padding; nothing may cross a cell boundary.
Cell assignments:
row 1 column 1: 木材 (material_wood) — a neat bundle of seasoned dark cedar slats and carved wooden pegs
row 1 column 2: 铁砂 (material_iron_sand) — a small open pouch of glittering black iron sand held by magnetic arcs
row 1 column 3: 查克拉晶片 (material_chakra_shard) — a faceted cyan chakra crystal shard with light trapped inside
row 1 column 4: 毒囊 (material_venom_sac) — a sealed purple venom sac with two small fang marks
row 1 column 5: 兽骨 (material_beast_bone) — clean ivory beast-bone segments suitable for crafting joints
row 2 column 1: 起爆黏土 (material_explosive_clay) — a compact lump of pale explosive clay with an orange warning glow and no markings
row 2 column 2: 优质布 (material_fine_cloth) — a folded bolt of durable midnight-blue ninja cloth with visible weave

row 2 column 5: 纸纤维 (material_paper_fiber) — a bundle of luminous white paper fibers and folded strips

row 3 column 2: 锋锐 (gear_power) — a razor-bright silver weapon edge cutting through a red spark
row 3 column 3: 坚守 (gear_guard) — a layered blue shield anchored by a heavy stone base
row 3 column 4: 轻灵 (gear_light) — a pale feather crossing three turquoise speed arcs
row 3 column 5: 破阵 (gear_breaker) — a steel wedge splitting a cracked enemy guard plate

row 4 column 2: 同心 (gear_bond) — two gold chakra cords tied into one unbreakable knot
row 4 column 3: 共鸣 (gear_reaction) — five elemental sparks converging into a bright central ring
row 4 column 4: 封术 (gear_seal) — crimson sealing rings closing around a dark technique core

Do not merge cells. Do not change the order. Keep the visual system consistent across the complete atlas.
